JAKE SCHRAMM // SOFTWARE ENGINEER

Building thoughtful digital tools for ministry, creativity, and community.

Welcome to my portfolio. I am a mid-level software engineer with experience in building full stack web apps with PHP and MySQL from conception to implementation. I also have worked on modernizing legacy web apps by peppering them with RabbitMQ and best-practice performance improvements. Enjoy the ride — powered by Astro static generation.

Start Mission
4Years of Experience
CreativeChristian & Software Builder

MISSION LOG

Passion reflected through meaningful projects. Creativity shaped from ideas into experiences.

This portfolio demonstrates a small glimpse of what I've done outside of my regular job over the past few years, whether in school (usually as part of a group project) or for fun.
